product_visual_description: Piccolo dispositivo rettangolare compatto (32×22×16 mm) con scocca in plastica nera opaca. La superficie superiore presenta una texture brushed con finissime righe parallele diagonali che conferiscono un aspetto premium. I bordi sono arrotondati con un profilo a due livelli: la parte superiore leggermente più stretta crea una cornice perimetrale nella parte inferiore. Sul lato corto destro è visibile una piccola porta micro-USB incassata. Il colore è nero antracite uniforme, quasi matte. Le dimensioni ridottissime lo rendono paragonabile a una pila di monete. Nessun display, nessun pulsante visibile frontalmente. Aspetto minimalista e discreto, tipico di un dispositivo di sicurezza professionale.
global_rule:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10C.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.

THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.

IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE FOR THIS JOB: LOGO_PROVIDED
- For images 02, 04, 06, 09: integrate the brand logo (SECOND image_input) following the LOGO INTEGRATION RULES.
- For images 01a, 01b, 03, 05, 07, 08: behave exactly as NO_LOGO — no logo, no placeholder, no empty reserved space.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER', or similar AS TEXT in the image.

ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

images.prompt:

This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10C.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: NO_LOGO for this image — no logo, no placeholder, no empty reserved space, fill every corner with content.
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01A — HERO SFONDO BIANCO:
STEP 1 — EXTRACT THE PRODUCT CUTOUT:
Take the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10C from the reference photo. It is a small rectangular black device (approx 32×22×16mm) with a brushed diagonal-line texture on the top surface, rounded corners with a two-level profile, and a small micro-USB port on the right short side. Extract it pixel-perfect as a clean cutout with no background from the original photo.

STEP 2 — COMPOSE ON WHITE BACKGROUND:
Place the product cutout centered at roughly 50% horizontal and 52% vertical of the 2000×2000px canvas.
Background: pure white RGB(255,255,255) — completely flat, no gradients, no shadows, no vignettes.
The product should appear at approximately 45% of the canvas width.
A very subtle, soft drop shadow directly beneath the product (offset 0px, blur 18px, black at 8% opacity) is allowed ONLY underneath — it must not touch the product itself.
Zero text. Zero logos. Zero watermarks. Zero graphic overlays. Zero empty placeholder areas.
The product is the sole subject. Clean Amazon main-image standard.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 01B — HERO CON EFFETTO RADAR SCAN:

STEP 1 — RENDER THE PRODUCT EXACTLY AS IN THE REFERENCE PHOTO:
Extract pixel-perfect the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10C: small rectangular black device with brushed diagonal texture on top, two-level rounded profile, micro-USB port on right side. Place it at the center of the 2000×2000px canvas, occupying approximately 40% of canvas width. The product sits on a SEPARATE untouchable layer above all background effects. Viewing angle: slight 3/4 perspective matching the reference photo.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE. Maintain as a separate layer always.
If any background effect bleeds onto the product surface — FAILURE.

STEP 2 — ADD RADAR SCAN BACKGROUND EFFECT ONLY BEHIND THE PRODUCT:
Background base: deep dark navy #0A0E27 to #1C2541 radial gradient centered at canvas center.
ONLY in the area BEHIND and AROUND the product — NOT touching, NOT overlapping the product itself:
- 5 concentric radar arcs centered on the product, color #00BFFF (electric blue), stroke width decreasing from 3px to 0.5px outward, opacity fading from 60% at innermost to 8% at outermost arc
- A rotating radar sweep beam: a thin pie-slice of light #00BFFF at 15% opacity, 35 degrees wide, emanating from center like a radar sweep frozen in motion at ~45 degrees
- Fine electromagnetic grid overlay: horizontal and vertical lines #00BFFF at 4% opacity, 60px spacing
- Small particle dots #00BFFF scattered in the background, sizes 2-4px, varying opacity 20-60%, approximately 40 dots total
- A subtle pulsing glow halo of #00BFFF at 12% opacity radius 180px centered behind the product — ONLY behind, not on the product
- Corner decorative elements: thin L-shaped bracket lines #00BFFF at 30% opacity in all 4 corners, 80px arm length, 2px stroke
NO text. NO logos. NO watermarks. NO empty space reserved for a logo.

Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.

IMAGE 02 — BENEFIT PRINCIPALE:
Background: deep dark navy gradient #0A0E27 (top-left) to #1C2541 (bottom-right). Very faint diagonal geometric line pattern #00BFFF at 3% opacity overlaid across full canvas.

TOP BANNER (full width, top 12% of canvas): Bold white text centered: 'SICUREZZA SEMPRE CON TE' — font size ~90px. Thin #00BFFF horizontal rule 2px below the title text.

LEFT 55% of canvas (below title banner): Product cutout of the F10C placed pixel-perfect from reference, centered vertically in this zone. Scale: product occupies approximately 60% of the left column height. Slight #00BFFF glow halo ONLY in the background behind the product (radius 120px, 18% opacity) — never touching the product itself. Below the product: small label in white bold 'MODELLO F10C' and in #00BFFF bold '32 × 22 × 16 mm' — size comparison silhouette of a euro coin next to it at 40px height.

RIGHT 45% of canvas (below title banner): 5 benefit lines, vertically distributed evenly.
Each line: #00BFFF checkmark icon (✓) 36px + bold white text 40px + thin separator line #00BFFF at 15% opacity below each item.
Benefit 1: '✓ Ascolto remoto in tempo reale'
Benefit 2: '✓ Chiamata automatica su voce'
Benefit 3: '✓ Localizzatore LBS integrato'
Benefit 4: '✓ Batteria 400 mAh — 72 ore'
Benefit 5: '✓ Ultradiscreto: 32×22×16 mm'

BOTTOM strip (bottom 8% of canvas): thin full-width bar #00BFFF at 20% opacity. Inside: white text 'Compatibile con TIM · Vodafone · Wind · Fastweb' — bold 32px centered.

Fill the entire canvas with content — no empty corner reserved for anything.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

Spec 1: icon (battery) — bold white 'BATTERIA' — #00BFFF '400 mAh'
Spec 2: icon (clock) — bold white 'AUTONOMIA' — #00BFFF '72 ore standby'
Spec 3: icon (wifi/signal) — bold white 'RETE' — #00BFFF 'GSM 2G'
Spec 4: icon (ruler) — bold white 'DIMENSIONI' — #00BFFF '32×22×16 mm'
Spec 5: icon (material) — bold white 'SCOCCA' — #00BFFF 'Plastica ABS'
Spec 6: icon (phone) — bold white 'COMPATIBILITÀ' — #00BFFF 'Android / iOS'

BOTTOM (bottom 10%): full-width dark bar #0A0E27. Centered bold white text 'Piccolo quanto una moneta — potente quanto un sistema di sicurezza' ~38px italic. Canvas completely filled.

IMAGE 07 — LIFESTYLE:
Photographic lifestyle scene. Show a woman aged 30-45, dressed in casual business attire (dark blazer, light blouse), standing in a modern home entrance corridor with warm ambient light — golden hour light streaming through a window, bokeh background showing a door and hallway furniture softly blurred.
She is looking at her smartphone screen with a calm, reassured expression — natural, confident, not staged. Her posture suggests she has just received a notification and feels in control.
In her other hand or placed on a console table nearby: the F10C product cutout extracted pixel-perfect from the reference photo. The product is small and clearly recognizable — the black rectangular device with brushed top surface. It sits naturally on the wooden console table in the foreground, in sharp focus.
Expression: calm confidence, sense of security.
Mood: genuine, warm, aspirational domestic scene. Not a staged advertisement pose.
Lighting: warm natural light #C8A87A tones, soft golden bokeh spheres in background.
NO text overlays. NO graphic elements. NO logo. NO watermarks. NO borders. NO empty reserved spaces. Pure photographic lifestyle feel. The entire 2000×2000px canvas is filled by the scene.

Card TOP-RIGHT (auto): Large icon (car) #00BFFF ~80px. Bold white 'IN AUTO' ~54px. White subtext 'Antifurto discreto per il veicolo' ~32px. Thin accent bottom line #00BFFF.

Card BOTTOM-LEFT (ufficio): Large icon (briefcase/building) #00BFFF ~80px. Bold white 'IN UFFICIO' ~54px. White subtext 'Proteggi spazi di lavoro' ~32px. Thin accent bottom line #00BFFF.

Card BOTTOM-RIGHT (outdoor/zaino): Large icon (backpack/shield) #00BFFF ~80px. Bold white 'IN VIAGGIO' ~54px. White subtext 'Controlla bagagli e spazi remoti' ~32px. Thin accent bottom line #00BFFF.

CENTER BETWEEN 4 CARDS: product cutout pixel-perfect from reference, scale ~16% canvas width, overlapping the card borders at the intersection point. It sits ABOVE all cards, fully untouched.

BOTTOM (bottom 10%): full-width #0A0E27 bar. Bold white centered 'Dimensioni 32×22×16 mm · Rete GSM 2G · Autonomia 72 ore' ~34px. #00BFFF accent dots separating the specs.

Canvas fully filled — no empty spaces.

images.name: Garanzia e Trust
images.prompt:
GLOBAL RULE — APPLIES TO ALL 10 IMAGES:
This is a PHOTO EDITING task, not a product generation task.
You are working with the uploaded reference photo of the Antifurto Microspia GSM F10C.
THE PRODUCT MUST BE TAKEN PIXEL-PERFECT FROM THE REFERENCE PHOTO.
Do not redraw it. Do not reinterpret it. Do not simplify it.
Treat it as a photographic cutout — only backgrounds and surrounding graphic elements change.
THE PRODUCT IS UNTOUCHABLE.
Do NOT alter its shape. Do NOT change its proportions.
Do NOT modify its colors. Do NOT add glow or effects ON it.
Do NOT blend it with the background.
If any effect touches the product — that is a FAILURE.
IGNORE ANY BRAND NAME OR LOGO IN THE REFERENCE PRODUCT PHOTO.
LOGO MODE: LOGO_PROVIDED — logo integration required (see LOGO PLACEMENT at end of prompt).
NEVER write the text 'LOGO', 'BRAND', 'PLACEHOLDER' in the image.
ALL TEXT IN IMAGES MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Output: 2000x2000px | 1:1 | JPEG.
Font: modern bold sans-serif.

IMAGE 09 — GARANZIA E TRUST:
Background: dark #0A0E1F solid with very faint hexagonal pattern #00BFFF at 4% opacity. Thin #00BFFF 2px border frame inset 24px from all canvas edges.

TOP (top 13%): Bold white centered 'ACQUISTO PROTETTO' ~86px. Below: #00BFFF thin 2px rule. Subtitle #00BFFF 'Perché scegliere il modello F10C' ~40px.

CENTER: 2×2 grid of 4 trust badge cards. Cards occupy ~74% canvas width and 56% canvas height, centered. Each card: background #141C2E, border #00BFFF 1.5px, border-radius 20px, padding 30px.

Card TOP-LEFT: Shield + checkmark icon #00BFFF ~76px. Bold white 'GARANZIA 12 MESI' ~52px. White subtext 'Assistenza diretta garantita' ~30px.

Card TOP-RIGHT: Truck/lightning icon #00BFFF ~76px. Bold white 'MANUALE ITALIANO' ~52px. White subtext 'Istruzioni in italiano incluse' ~30px.

Card BOTTOM-LEFT: Star/medal icon #00BFFF ~76px. Bold white 'QUALITÀ VERIFICATA' ~52px. White subtext 'Testato per 10+ anni di sviluppo' ~30px.

Card BOTTOM-RIGHT: Headset/chat icon #00BFFF ~76px. Bold white 'SUPPORTO DEDICATO' ~52px. White subtext 'Assistenza clienti italiana' ~30px.

BELOW CARDS (between cards and bottom): product cutout pixel-perfect from reference centered horizontally, scale ~22% canvas width. On left of product: bold #00BFFF 'F10C' ~52px + white 'Modello' ~32px above. On right of product: bold white '4.1★' ~52px + grey '(15 recensioni)' ~32px.

BOTTOM (bottom 9%): dark #070B18 bar full-width. Bold white centered 'Uso responsabile nel rispetto della normativa vigente' ~32px italic #00BFFF. Full frame of content — no reserved empty area anywhere.

LOGO PLACEMENT: Integrate the brand logo (provided as the SECOND reference image) in the BOTTOM-RIGHT corner of the final image. Logo width: approximately 12-15% of the image width. Padding: about 4% from the right edge and 4% from the bottom edge. The logo must be clearly visible and legible. If the background behind the logo has a similar tone to the logo colors, add a subtle contrast enhancement (soft drop shadow OR a very faint white backdrop card at 10-20% opacity) to ensure readability. The logo is a brand marker: do NOT distort it, do NOT tilt it, do NOT let other elements cover it. Preserve the EXACT colors and proportions of the original logo. Do NOT add any text label next to the logo. This logo is the CLIENT brand identity (distinct from 'No supplier brand names or logos' in the negative prompt, which refers only to manufacturer marks visible on the product).

negative_prompt: No redrawn product. No illustrated or cartoon style product. No product recreated from scratch. No glow or color effect applied directly ON the product. No shape or proportion alteration of the product. No background effects touching, overlapping, or bleeding onto the product. No text in English (except brand names if inevitable). No supplier brand names or logos. No placeholder text like 'LOGO HERE', '[BRAND]', 'LOGO CLIENTE', 'YOUR LOGO', 'BRAND HERE'. No empty rectangular or circular space intentionally left blank for a logo. No watermarks, no signatures, no trademark symbols. Do not write the word 'LOGO' anywhere in the image. No GPS label claiming centimeter accuracy (device uses LBS triangulation only). No invented technical specifications not present in the product data.
